results.title: Last Thai standing: Kunlavut storms into Tokyo quarters
results.description: Kunlavut Vitidsarn advanced to the quarter-finals of the US$950,000 (approximately 32 million baht) BWF Japan Open in Tokyo on Thursday, but Panitchaphon Teeraratsakul and the mixed doubles pair Dechapol Puavaranukroh/Supissara Paewsampran ended their challenges in the second round.

results.title: Former American Home Furniture site to welcome major retail project
results.description: A major retail development with more than 55,000 square feet of new commercial space is underway at 3535 Menaul NE in Albuquerque, with Panda Express and Mister Car Wash confirmed as tenants. The project is expected to be completed in two phases by spring and summer 2027.

results.title: Texas flash floods leave at least 2 dead in region devastated a year ago
results.description: UVALDE, Texas — Catastrophic flash floods in Texas have killed two people and forced hundreds of rescues in areas still reeling from devastating floods a year ago, Gov. Greg Abbott said Thursday.

results.title: Claude for Teachers Gives Educators Free Premium AI Access
results.description: Claude for Teachers launched July 14, 2026, giving verified US K-12 educators free premium access for one year. The program includes standards-aligned lesson planning through Learning Commons, Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and a Gates Foundation-backed pilot evaluation in Detroit Public Schools. The post Claude for Teachers Gives Educators Free Premium AI Access appeared first on Memeburn .

results.title: Pulsed-power prototype completes 3,000 tests at 95% efficiency for future fusion plants
results.description: Pacific Fusion's Sirius pulsed-power prototype surpasses 3,000 shots as the company scales fusion technology.

results.title: The Odyssey Ending Explained: Why Christopher Nolan’s Film Changes Homer’s Epic
results.description: Universal Pictures The Odyssey is rightly regarded as another cinematic triumph from director Christopher Nolan (The Dark Knight, Inception, Oppenheimer). This time, Nolan is bringing his modern filmmaking sensibilities to one of the oldest known texts in the world: Homer’s poem The Odyssey, the second part of his epic saga about Greece’s downfall via the Trojan War, [...]

results.description: Port Washington's Fish Days festival is moving forward this weekend despite historically bad air quality from wildfire smoke, with organizers putting precautions in place to protect volunteers and attendees.
